/usr/bin/ar qc libdnssd-cpp.a "CMakeFiles/dnssd-cpp.dir/src/ServiceDescription.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnssd-cpp.dir/src/common/Result.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnssd-cpp.dir/src/common/Log.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnssd-cpp.dir/src/avahi/AvahiAdvertiser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnssd-cpp.dir/src/avahi/AvahiBrowser.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libdnssd-cpp.a
